package.name: mas_bearing_loc
package.description:
Single-view monocular bearing-only target localization via a Delay-Compensated Extended Kalman Filter (DC-EKF), reproducing Liu et al. (arXiv 2606.10639, "Planar-Sector LOS Guidance"), Section III-E.
The 18D state EKF fuses high-rate IMU with delayed normalized image features (gimbal + YOLO bbox center) using IMU buffering and backward-update/forward-replay delay compensation. Intended primarily as a single-agent baseline for comparison against cooperative multi-view triangulation.
